scripts.build:site: turbo run build --filter=marketing --filter=docs && rm -rf apps/marketing/dist/docs && mkdir -p apps/marketing/dist/docs && cp -r apps/docs/out/. apps/marketing/dist/docs && cp -r apps/docs/out/docs/. apps/marketing/dist/docs && rm -rf apps/marketing/dist/docs/docs
scripts.dev: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml up -d && turbo run dev --filter=@breadcrumb/server --filter=@breadcrumb/web
scripts.db:reset: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml down -v && docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml up -d
